headline: A Look At Universal Health Services (UHS) Valuation After The Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Why Universal Health Services is on investors’ radar Universal Health Services (UHS) has drawn fresh attention after a stretch where the share price has fallen about 18% over the past month and 13% over the past 3 months, prompting closer inspection of its fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Universal Health Services.
